notes: Continuous voice conversation now reopens a 15-second no-wake reply window exactly when Scrap finishes speaking.
Star Citizen intelligence now uses source-backed LIVE build, ship, cargo, crew, mission, location, item, and blueprint data with no-guess safeguards.
Nyx and the reviewed Alpha 4.9 Frontier Tensions content are corrected and current; Scrap checks the LIVE game-data build daily.
Rare contextual relationship questions help Scrap learn the player without turning conversation into a questionnaire.
